name: wow-first-160s
description: Show the destination first. Explain why later. The Apple-keynote shape. 11 content frames between cover and close.

beats.concept: Title card with hero copy and meta chips
beats.delivery_note: Hold the cover for 8s while the recorder confirms capture.

beats.stock_voiceover: Look. Twenty-six futures of your idea. Before any spec. {{hero_copy}}
beats.navbar_keys_label: ★ OPENING WOW · 10s hold · half-beat silence after the hero line
beats.delivery_note: Read the hero slowly. Each syllable. Half-beat silence after.

beats.concept: Problem framing — chain that ends in `?`
beats.stock_heading: we don't know what we want.
beats.stock_meta_tag: act ii · the agro · why it had to be flipped
beats.stock_voiceover: Here's the lie we tell every project: 'I know what I want.' You don't. Not until you see it.
beats.delivery_note: Open like you've already lost patience with the room. No smile. Land each fragment.

beats.stock_voiceover: Tests pass. Specs lock. Product wrong. Every. Single. Time.
beats.delivery_note: Rapid-fire 4 fragments. Drop pitch on each beat of 'Every. Single. Time.'

beats.concept: Pivot — chain reverses, color shifts to green
beats.stock_meta_tag: act iii · the pivot · what we built
beats.stock_voiceover: So we flipped it. See the result first. Twenty-six of them — before any spec. The picture is the spec.
beats.delivery_note: Say 'So we flipped it' like you've solved something. Then go quiet.

beats.stock_voiceover: How? 144 Opus 4.7 personas. One plugin. Two clicks.
beats.delivery_note: 'How?' is a question to the room — a beat of audience participation.

beats.stock_voiceover: Yeah, 144. Organized as one engineering company. Six tiers. SQLite blackboard keeps everyone in sync — no chat-thread spaghetti.
beats.delivery_note: 'Yeah, 144' is the casual confirmation. The phrase 'no chat-thread spaghetti' is the line judges remember.

beats.concept: Socratic / form interaction with live-filling JSON
beats.stock_voiceover: Four questions. That's it. Persona. Surface. Killer feature. Hard constraint. Now every advocate inherits the same truth.
beats.delivery_note: 'That's it' = casual confidence. The four-word list is staccato.

beats.stock_meta_tag: act iv · gate h1 · click one
beats.stock_voiceover: Twenty-six advocates. In parallel. Pick the one that matches your gut. Click one.
beats.delivery_note: 'Pick the one that matches your gut' — almost spoken aside. Then snap of 'Click one.'

beats.stock_voiceover: Now watch. Spec hashed. Locked. Five teams build. In parallel. Five judges. Five auditors. Double-gate. The harness self-corrects — until it earns the score.
beats.delivery_note: Seven fragments rapid-fire. Long pause before 'until it earns the score' — the em-dash is a held breath.
beats.tone_note: live narration of a crafted process

beats.stock_meta_tag: act v · gate h2 · click two
beats.stock_voiceover: Click two. Done. The server launches itself. A tab opens. Three minutes ago — this was one line.
beats.navbar_keys_label: ★ THE EMOTIONAL PAYOFF · hold the working app
beats.delivery_note: 'Click two. Done.' like dropping a tool onto a workbench. Then quiet awe — not pride.

beats.concept: Outro — repo + install snippet + hero echo
beats.stock_voiceover: Open source. Apache 2.0. Two commands to install. {{hero_copy}}
beats.delivery_note: The hero echo is the last thing said in the entire video. Slow it down. Each syllable. Then silence.
Hold the close screen 12s while the recorder cuts. The hero echo is the last word on screen.
